ddls:
CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_code" TEXT /* Code for the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the warehouse */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the warehouse (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the warehouse was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the warehouse was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "tenant_code" TEXT /* Code for the tenant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the tenant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the tenant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the tenant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tenant (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tenant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tenant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "trans_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the transaction occurred */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant who initiated the transaction */,
  "trans_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "trans_cat" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (inbound, outbound) */,
  "qty" INTEGER /* Quantity involved in the transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item involved in the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the item */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trans_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the item is stored */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant who owns the item */,
  "qty" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the item */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id", "warehouse_id", "tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (warehouse manager, logistics coordinator, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction history entry */,
  "trans_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the transaction occurred */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant who initiated the transaction */,
  "trans_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "trans_cat" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (inbound, outbound) */,
  "qty" INTEGER /* Quantity involved in the transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item involved in the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the item */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_trans_id FOREIGN KEY ("trans_id") REFERENCES transactions ("trans_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)
